title: Numbers, Shapes, and Measurement Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A word or symbol that shows how many things there are.
choices: number
million
fact
rounds.answer: number
rounds.explanation: number: A word or symbol that shows how many things there are.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Putting numbers together to find a total.
choices: number
million
addition
rounds.answer: addition
rounds.explanation: addition: Putting numbers together to find a total.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: How big or small something is.
choices: million
size
number
rounds.answer: size
rounds.explanation: size: How big or small something is.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: How big or small something is.
Splitting a number into equal parts.
Taking one number away from another.
To find the size or amount of something.
rounds.answer: Taking one number away from another.
rounds.explanation: In subtraction, 6 minus 2 equals 4.
